Component.Name: ReplenOrdNumGridCol
Component.Caption: Purchase Order
Component.Description: WARNING: do not use the list source wizard to alter the list source

EventHandler.Name: CheckObsolete
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLItems.ObsSlowSp( PARMS(VAR V(ItemVar), VAR 1, VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 1, MESSAGE, RVAR V(ItemObsSlowPrompt), RVAR V(ItemObsSlowPromptButtons), VAR V(Parm_Site)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: DueDateChanged
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLMrpWbs.MrpWbGetDateSp( PARMS(VAR V(RefTab), VAR C(ItemGridCol), VAR C(SupplySiteGridCol), VAR C(ReqdQtyGridCol), VAR C(DueDateGridCol), RVAR C(ReleaseDateGridCol), MESSAGE, VAR P(Plant)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: GetItemInfo
EventHandler.Response: SLPoItems.PoItemGetItemInfoSp( PARMS(RVAR P(Item), VAR P(PriVendNum), VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR 0, VAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, MESSAGE, VAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR , RVAR V(PromptMsgUseUp)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: GetPoInfo
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLMrpWbs.MrpWbGetPoInfoSpV2( PARMS(VAR C(ReplenOrdNumGridCol), VAR C(DueDateGridCol), VAR C(ItemGridCol), RVAR V(VendNum), RVAR V(BlanketUnitCost), RVAR V(IsBlanket), MESSAGE, RVAR C(ToWhseGridCol), RVAR V(Plant)) )

EventHandler.Name: GetTransferInfo
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLMrpWbs.MrpWbGetTransferInfoSpV2( PARMS(VAR C(ReplenOrdNumGridCol), VAR C(ItemGridCol), RVAR C(SupplySiteGridCol), RVAR C(FromWhseGridCol), RVAR C(ToWhseGridCol), RVAR C(PriUnitCostEdit), RVAR C(PriLeadTimeEdit), MESSAGE, RVAR V(Plant), RVAR V(TransferToSite)) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchPlanningDetail
EventHandler.Response: PlanningDetail( SETVARVALUES(PCFilter=Item = FP(Item), PPlant = P(Plant)) LINKBY(Item=Item) SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(PCFilter=Item = FP(Item), PPlant = P(Plant)) )

EventHandler.Name: QtyBreakCost
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLMrpWbs.MrpWbGetCostSp( PARMS(VAR V(Item), VAR V(ReqdQty), VAR V(VendNum), VAR V(ToWhse), RVAR V(LeadTime), RVAR V(UnitCost)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SETVARVALUES(MpwIdoPo=SL.SLPos( PROPERTIES(PoNum, VendNum, DerStatFormatted, Whse) FILTER(charindex(po.stat, 'PO') > 0) ), MpwIdoPs=SL.SLPs( PROPERTIES(PsNum, Description, Stat) FILTER(charindex(ps.stat, 'PR') > 0) ), MpwIdoTrn=SL.SLTransfers( PROPERTIES(TrnNum, DerStatFormatted, FromSite, FromWhse, ToSite, ToWhse) FILTER(charindex(tra.stat, 'OT') > 0) ))

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLFormAdoption.LoadBannerStatus( PARMS(VAR V(CurrentFormName), RVAR V(DisableBanner), RVAR V(EndOfSupport), RVAR V(NewFormName), RVAR V(ToastStatus)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLFormExtMsgEntities.FormatJSONVar( PARMS(VAR MaterialPlannerWorkbench, VAR V(JSONVarNotInterpret), RVAR V(JSONVarWithLIT)) COLID(object) )

Variable.Name: fds_DataSource
Variable.Value: SL.SLMrpWbs( FILTERPERM(V(PermanentFilter) AND ((Plant = FV(InitialPlantFilterVar) OR FV(InitialPlantFilterVar)=''))) ORDERBY(Item,DueDate,PriVendNum) LOCKMODE(Row) )

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: Function CanProcessLine(ByRef iRow As Integer) As Boolean
Function VendorChanged(ByVal IsPrimary As Boolean) As Integer
sFilterString = sFilterString & " AND ReleaseDate >= " & FormatDate(BeginDate) & " AND ReleaseDate < " & FormatDate(AfterEndDate)
sFilterString = sFilterString & " AND ReleaseDate >= " & FormatDate(BeginDate) & " AND ReleaseDate < " & FormatDate(AfterEndDate)
For a As Integer = 0 To Iws.GetNumEntries() - 1
Private Function GetCurrentToday(ByVal ObjectDate As Date, ByRef BeginDateOfToday As Date, ByRef DateAfterEndDate As Date) As Boolean
'Input: ObjectDate - Date which is specified by user
'Output: BeginDateOfToday - Begin of date which is specified by user
' DateAfterEndDate - The date after end of date which is specified by user
Private Function GetCurrentWeek(ByVal ObjectDate As Date, ByRef BeginDateOfWeek As Date, ByRef DateAfterEndDate As Date) As Boolean
'Input: ObjectDate - Date within the calendar week.
'Output: BeginDateOfWeek - Begin of the calendar week
' DateAfterEndDate - The date after end of the calendar week
Private Function FormatDate(ByVal ObjectDate As Date) As String
